title: Boonda's Moon
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Boondas_fortress.jpg]] |name=Boonda's Moon |region=*[[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector= |system=[[Kleeva system/Legends|Kleeva system]]''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' |coordinates=R-11 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited=[[Kleeva]] |position= |moons= |routes=[[Oktos Route]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Atmosphere/Legends#Type I atmospheres|Type I]] {{C|breathable}}[[Droids (1995) 4|''Droids'' (1995) 4]] |climate= |gravity= |terrain=*[[Forest/Legends|Forests]]''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' {{C|Poster}} *[[Mountain/Legends|Mountains]] *Plains |water= |interest=*[[Boonda's fortress]] *[[Heiberg Forest]] *[[Moolaney Plains]] *[[Nomaos Ridge]] *[[Recycling fields]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=*[[Human/Legends|Human]] *[[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] *[[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] |socialgroup= |language=*[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] *[[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports=[[Droid/Legends|Droids]] |affiliation=[[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] }} {{Quote|We've received confirmation from Boonda's Moon. The drone barge will be waiting for us when we reach the moon's orbit.''"
"''Very good, Officer. Boonda's Moon indeed! Leave it to a Hutt to name an entire planetoid after himself.|[[Dylak]] and [[Groot]]|}} '''Boonda's Moon''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] located in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. It was one of at least three [[Moon/Legends|moons]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the massive [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Kleeva]]. ==History== {{Quote|Why doesn't the Empire just take over Boonda's factory?''"
"''If we took over his factory, we'd only create trouble with other Hutts. Hutts are dastardly criminals, but they're effective in business. It's better to have Boonda working with us than against us.|[[Pelvin]] and [[Groot]]|}} [[File:Boondas_Moon.jpg|thumb|left|195px|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] landed in the [[recycling fields]] on Boonda's Moon]] [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] won [[Kleeva]]'s third [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in an illegal card game. He decided to make it his home and named it after himself. Several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]], Boonda secretly ended his criminal career, though he encouraged others to believe that he was still a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], especially the other Hutts, who believed that running an honest business was the worst crime of all. Boonda built a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Boonda's fortress|factory]] on his moon that was completely legal. His factory manufactured many different kinds of droids that were all well made and affordable. Over the years, Boonda's business turned out to be extremely successful and he became one of the wealthiest Hutts in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Later on, in the midst of 5.5 BBY, a [[droid rebellion]] occurred when [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] led various disgruntled and angered droids against [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. The rebellion ended with the freeing of all of the droids. {{Moon-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Droids (1995) 3|''Droids'' (1995) 3]] {{1st}} *[[Droids (1995) 4|''Droids'' (1995) 4]] *''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' *''[[Star Wars Missions 10: Showdown in Mos Eisley]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars Missions 11: Bounty Hunters vs. Battle Droids]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars Missions 12: The Vactooine Disaster]]'' ==Sources== *{{FactFile|133|MOV 3-4|B-9D7 (Movo Brattakin's Assistant)}} *''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Factory worlds]] [[Category:Kleeva system locations]] [[Category:Moons in Hutt Space]] [[Category:Type I atmosphere moons]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Boonda's Moon locations]] }}
